app.name: TrueSight
auth.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.subtitleLogin: Welcome back! Please login to your account
auth.registerHint: By clicking register, you agree to our terms of service
auth.loginHint: We take your privacy and security seriously
auth.verifyStepSubtitle: We have sent a verification code to your email
error.rateLimit: Too many requests, please try again later
inbox.title: Inbox
stats.title: Statistics
stats.classificationDesc: Quadrant distribution and email trends based on recent messages.
calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.desc: Meetings, deadlines, exams, and events identified from emails. Can be written directly to Outlook Calendar.
settings.title: Settings
settings.outlookAuthDesc: Click the button to open the Composio authorization window. Return to this page after completing login.
settings.manualAddDesc: For multi-account scenarios: fill in Outlook's mailboxUserId and Composio connectedAccountId (`ca_...`).
settings.sourceLabelPlaceholder: Data source label, e.g., School Outlook
settings.knowledgeBaseDesc: Comprehensive summarization and organization of emails to build your personal knowledge base. Includes email summaries, event clustering, sender profiles, and more.
settings.noDataSourceForSummarize: Please connect an email data source first before summarizing
settings.confirmSummarize: Are you sure you want to start email history summarization? This may take a few minutes.
settings.checkStatusLater: Please refresh the page later to check the status
common.dataSourceConfirmDelete: Delete data source "{label}"? This action cannot be undone.
common.dataSourceNotReady: Data source {id} is not ready yet.
common.sourceSnapshotRefreshed: Data source snapshot has been refreshed.
common.noDataSourceAvailable: No data source available. Please add and verify an email source on the settings page first.
common.dataSourceNotVerified: Current data source has not been verified. Please click verify on the settings page.
common.dataSourceFailFastFailed: Current data source failed Fail-fast check. Please re-verify or switch data source on the settings page.
common.dataSourceRollbackSuccess: Current data source check failed, rolled back to available data source.
common.browserNoSupportPopup: Browser did not open the authorization popup automatically. Please click "Open auth page" below to complete authorization.
common.authWindowOpened: Authorization window opened. Please continue Outlook login in that window.
common.composioAuthWindowOpened: Composio authorization window opened. Please complete Outlook login in the new window.
common.yourBrowserNoSupportBroadcastChan: Your browser does not support real-time status updates. Outlook authorization status may not update automatically. Please watch for popup notifications.
common.fillCompleteDataSourceInfo: Please fill in all data source label, Mailbox User ID, and Composio Account ID.
